stemHtml: What is the correct definition of the geocentric latitude of a position on the Earth? Geocentric latitude is the angle between the…

options.a: plane of the ecliptic and the parallel of the position.
options.b: plane of the Equator and the line from the centre of the Earth to the position.
options.c: plane of the Prime Meridian and the plane of the meridian of the position.
options.d: Earth’s rotational axis and the line from the centre of the Earth to the position.
